flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Arkansas State University-Newport fell 74% between 2006 and 2009 (33.3% → 8.7%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Arkansas State University-Newport rose 17% between 2017 and 2020 ($6.8k → $8.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Arkansas State University-Newport rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.9k → $3.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Arkansas State University-Newport rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.3k → $4.8k).
